---
title: "Applications"
---

Application pages are active proof/benchmark target tracks for AI, compute, rendering, systems, and data analysis. Benchmark claims must stay separate from Lean proof status.

<div class="warning-box">
Application pages are active but exploratory unless a theorem card says otherwise. Benchmarks and fixtures are executable references, not proof of real-world performance or usefulness.
</div>

## Tracks

- [Data analysis](data_analysis.qmd): finite phase coordinates plus synthetic periodic-data fixtures.
- [Compute](compute.qmd): cyclic addresses, direction bins, stride layouts, and round-robin schedule seeds.
- [AI](ai.qmd): finite phase channels, cyclic memory slots, and adapter-block indexing seeds.
- [Rendering](rendering.qmd): CoilRay and sampling vocabulary, currently limited to finite direction-bin scheduling facts.

## Representative Proved Seeds

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="APPD-T0004"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPC-T0004"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPR-T0004"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPL-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPS-T0004"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIA-T0004"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0004"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0004"></div>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
